channel.title: Posts on Better Late Than Never
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Better Late Than Never

item.description: I have worked for last 2 weeks in comp dev and resolved 2 tickets. I was wondering how it will feel like in here, but important point is whether I enjoy doing this, but I’m not sure yet.

item.title: 05302023 daily
item.description: mostly calm and easy day. We got Canadian citizenship test schedule on June. It feels very fast process, also time is going faster.

item.title: Vacation plan
item.description: going through three raytracing in one weekend series https://raytracing.github.io/ reading cpp books researching npr / collecting project materials clearing up homeworks

item.title: 05292023 daily
item.description: Where am I going? I questioned to myself this morning. I just got noticed a slight health issue (caused by laziness) and then.

item.title: Reviewing OOP
item.description: Reviewing OOP As a self-taught coder, I’ve always admired well-written codes. Actually it is hard to have a chance to see such codes at work, but it definitely exists.

item.title: Typography
item.description: Lid est laborum et dolorum fuga. Et harum quidem rerum facilis est et expeditasi distinctio. Nam libero tempore, cum soluta nobis est eligendi optio cumque nihilse impedit quo minus id quod amets untra dolor amet sad.
